response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of engineering experience and holds a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science. He possesses strong software craftsmanship, cloud infrastructure experience, and an entrepreneurial background through his founding of GISCollective. However, for a Director-level AI Strategy role, his AI experience is relatively recent and limited to a 6-month stint working on AI-agent tooling, which falls short of the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic customer advisory experience expected for this Principal-level position.
strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software and infrastructure engineering experience.
Entrepreneurial background as the founder of GISCollective, building cloud-native platforms.
Recent hands-on builder experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
concerns: AI experience is very recent (6 months) and lacks long-term strategic depth.
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers on AI adoption at a Director level.
Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
